# The Unicorn Card
Official website: https://theunicorncard.com/

"The Unicorn Card" is the proper name used by this site for one specific baseball card:
2018 Topps Future Stars Shohei Ohtani #FS-5 Black parallel.

This is distinct from the generic phrase "a unicorn card."
The card is visually subtle, unnumbered, and has reportedly been mistaken or mislabeled as the base version.
Independent collector research project; not affiliated with Topps, MLB, the Los Angeles Dodgers, or Shohei Ohtani.
